steps.term: fun Domain => fun Value => fun IntegralValue => fun domainMeasurable => fun valueMeasurable => fun simpleIntegral => forall (P : Prop), forall (mk : forall (respects_pointwise_eq_law : forall (f : forall (x : Domain), Value), forall (g : forall (x : Domain), Value), forall (f_simple : @SimpleFunction.{i,u,v} Domain Value domainMeasurable valueMeasurable f), forall (g_simple : @SimpleFunction.{i,u,v} Domain Value domainMeasurable valueMeasurable g), forall (pointwise_eq : forall (x : Domain), @Eq.{v} Value (f x) (g x)), @Eq.{m} IntegralValue (simpleIntegral f) (simpleIntegral g)), forall (representation_invariance_law : forall (f : forall (x : Domain), Value), forall (f_simple : @SimpleFunction.{i,u,v} Domain Value domainMeasurable valueMeasurable f), Prop), forall (nonnegative_simple_integral_law : forall (f : forall (x : Domain), Value), forall (f_simple : @SimpleFunction.{i,u,v} Domain Value domainMeasurable valueMeasurable f), Prop), forall (extended_value_domain_law : Prop), P), P

fun Domain => fun Value => fun IntegralValue => fun domainMeasurable => fun valueMeasurable => fun simpleIntegral => fun structure => fun f => fun f_simple => structure (@Eq.{m} IntegralValue (simpleIntegral f) (simpleIntegral f)) (fun (respects_pointwise_eq_law : forall (f : forall (x : Domain), Value), forall (g : forall (x : Domain), Value), forall (f_simple : @SimpleFunction.{i,u,v} Domain Value domainMeasurable valueMeasurable f), forall (g_simple : @SimpleFunction.{i,u,v} Domain Value domainMeasurable valueMeasurable g), forall (pointwise_eq : forall (x : Domain), @Eq.{v} Value (f x) (g x)), @Eq.{m} IntegralValue (simpleIntegral f) (simpleIntegral g)) => fun (representation_invariance_law : forall (f : forall (x : Domain), Value), forall (f_simple : @SimpleFunction.{i,u,v} Domain Value domainMeasurable valueMeasurable f), Prop) => fun (nonnegative_simple_integral_law : forall (f : forall (x : Domain), Value), forall (f_simple : @SimpleFunction.{i,u,v} Domain Value domainMeasurable valueMeasurable f), Prop) => fun (extended_value_domain_law : Prop) => respects_pointwise_eq_law f f f_simple f_simple (fun (x : Domain) => @Eq.refl.{v} Value (f x)))
